title: stajichlab/nf_funannotate1 — samplesheet schema
description: Schema for the samples.csv samplesheet passed to --samples.

SPECIES.description: Binomial species name, e.g. 'Aspergillus fumigatus'. Used to derive the sample tag and to look up RNA-seq data.
SPECIES.errorMessage: SPECIES is required and must be a non-empty string

STRAIN.description: Strain / isolate identifier, e.g. 'Af293'. May be blank; the first semicolon-delimited token is used.

ASMID.description: Assembly identifier, e.g. 'GCA_000002655.1' or a local slug. Used as the primary sample key and output directory name.
ASMID.errorMessage: ASMID is required and must be a non-empty string

LOCUSTAG.description: GenBank locus-tag prefix assigned to this assembly, e.g. 'AFUA'.

BUSCO_LINEAGE.description: BUSCO lineage dataset name, e.g. 'fungi_odb10' or 'saccharomycetes_odb12'. Must match a dataset available in the local BUSCO downloads.

TRANSL_TABLE.description: NCBI genetic code translation table number (1 = standard, 4 = Mycoplasma/Spiroplasma, 12 = alt-yeast). Defaults to 1 if blank.

NCBI_TAXONID.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID for the species (used for SRA queries). May be blank if run_sra_fetch=false.

GENOME.description: Path to the input genome FASTA (.fa, .fna, .fasta, or .gz). Absolute path or relative to launchDir. If blank, the genome is resolved from params.source as <source>/<ASMID>/<ASMID>_genomic.fna.gz.

PHYLUM.description: Phylum name (optional). Used by --taxon PHYLUM:Ascomycota to filter samples.
